prompt: Tap the button seat before selecting turn line.
why_v1: Position anchor remains relevant on turn continuation.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. The button stays last to act on the turn, so anchoring that seat first keeps the turn-line choice tied to position advantage.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The button still acts last on the turn, so anchor that seat first. That position edge is what tells you whether betting again or checking back makes sense.
